name: 03 - Handoff Humano (Chatwoot v2)
description: Handoff humano: webhook -> normalizar payload -> Chatwoot node oficial (criar conversation + message) -> respond. Substitui o workflow v1 que usava httpRequest ad-hoc com inbox URL fallback. Requer credencial 'Chatwoot API' configurada no N8N (X-Canal=cron/dpo ou super_admin). Ref: ADR-020.

parameters.responseBody:
={
  "status": "handoff",
  "response": "Transferi para um atendente humano. Acesse: {{ $('Normalizar Payload').item.json.inbox_url }}",
  "chatwoot_conversation_id": {{ $('Chatwoot: Create Conversation').item.json.id || 'null' }},
  "chatwoot_message_status": {{ JSON.stringify($('Chatwoot: Send Message').item.json.status || 'unavailable') }},
  "sender": "{{ $('Normalizar Payload').item.json.sender }}",
  "message_id": "{{ $('Normalizar Payload').item.json.message_id }}",
  "reason": "{{ $('Normalizar Payload').item.json.reason }}",
  "canal": "{{ $('Normalizar Payload').item.json.canal }}",
  "transport": "n8n-nodes-chatwoot-v1.0.2"
}
